prompt: Create a grainy, cinematic 35mm film-style portrait photo of a young woman standing at a traditional Japanese shrine walkway at golden hour, wearing an ornate white and deep red kimono-inspired shrine maiden outfit with wide translucent lace sleeves, red trim, floral embroidery, a pale fluffy fur stole around her shoulders, layered obi cords, gold rope details, and a large red bow at the waist. She has black shoulder-length hair and an elaborate hair ornament on the left side: exactly 1 white fox mask with red markings, plus pink flowers, red tassels, and dangling beads. Her hands are raised beside her head as if adjusting her hair accessory, with both forearms visible. Place a solid centered rectangular censor block over her face, colored muted brown-gray, obscuring all facial features. The background is a dim forest shrine setting with red torii gates and red wooden railings receding into depth, dark trees, stone steps, and a faint stone guardian statue on the left. Use natural warm backlight, soft shadows, high ISO grain, slight underexposure, muted vintage colors, shallow depth of field, and an intimate vertical composition cropped from head to waist. No extra text, no watermark, no additional people.
